name: Mel's Churros
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Add butter and salt to the boiling water.
3. Gradually add flour while stirring continuously until well combined.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Beat in eggs and cinnamon until smooth.
6. Squeeze the batter into a pastry bag fitted with a 1-inch round nozzle.
7. Heat oil in a pan or deep fryer to about 350°F (175°C).
8. Carefully pipe the batter into the hot oil, forming churros approximately 7 inches long each.
9. Cook until golden brown, turning occasionally. This should take about 3-5 minutes per batch, depending on the size of your pan.
10. Remove with a skimmer or spatula and drain on paper towels.
11. Transfer to a serving dish.
12. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the churros.
13. Serve immediately.
Makes about 18 servings.
